title: Beginner Worksheet: Parts of Speech
content:
Parts of Speech Worksheet

1) Identify the part of speech: "Ram"
2) Identify the part of speech: "quickly"
3) Fill in the blank: She ____ (go/goes) to school.

Answer key:
1) Noun
2) Adverb
3) goes

title: Intermediate Worksheet: Tense
content:
Tense Worksheet

1) Change to past: I eat rice.
2) Make a negative: He is happy.
3) Make a question: They play cricket.
